//: Global gallery-dl config. Loupe shells out to gallery-dl, which reads this file itself — put credentials, cookies and rate limits here once and every source picks them up. Location: ~/.config/gallery-dl/config.json (in Docker: mount at /app/.config/gallery-dl/config.json). Full reference: https://gdl-org.github.io/docs/configuration.html

extractor.//: Per-site credentials. Remove the sections you don't use.

reddit.//: Anonymous access works but is heavily rate-limited; a registered OAuth client id is recommended.

twitter.//: Most feeds need a logged-in session; export cookies from your browser.

downloader.//: Be polite to the sites you poll.
